title: TCP IP Model
overview: While the OSI model is a theoretical guide, the TCP/IP model is the practical suite of protocols underpinning today’s Internet. Originally developed in the 1970s by the U.S. Department of Defense, its design emphasizes resilience / networks stay up even when parts fail or are attacked.
